lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: So you've been captured too?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Captured?

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: Yes, Evil Bob captured me and stuck me in this prison.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I get out of here? I can't be held captive by a cat!

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: Some of these balloon animals have keys in them, and if you pull the big lever it tells you which shape animal contains the correct key, but I can never find it.

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: You need to pull the lever to find out which shape animal contains the key, then pop that sort of animal to get the key.

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: Bring me any keys you get and I'll try them on the doors.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: Oh. Well I guess you can leave but I'll still be stuck here.

sections.title: Attempting to pop a balloon animal before pulling the lever

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: You're meant to pull the lever to find out which sort of animal to pop!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is this place?

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: Don't you remember? This is ScapeRune's prison. Evil Bob caught you and brought you here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What gives him the right to lock me up? I demand to see a lawyer! I know my rights!

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: Evil Bob doesn't care about people's rights. He's cruel and utterly merciless. He's a cat.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I get out of here? I can't be held captive by a cat!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I get out of here? I can't be held captive by a cat!

sections.title: Using an item other than a prison key on Prison Pete

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: No thanks, I don't want that just now.

sections.title: Pulling the lever for the first time

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: That's right, pull it. Then remember what kind of animal shape you see. That's the animal that contains the right key.

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: Great, now you've got a key! Bring it to me so I can try it on the doors.

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: Ooh, thanks! I'll see if it's the right one...

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: Aww, that was the wrong key! You must have popped the wrong sort of animal. Try the big lever again - it'll tell you which animal to pop.

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: Hooray, you got the right one! Now pull the lever again and let's get the next portal unlocked!

sections.title: Attempting to pop a balloon animal whilst holding a prison key

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: Hey, bring me that key you've got! I wanna get out of here!

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: You did it, you got all the keys right! Thank you! You're my friend FOREVER!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's get out of here before that cat notices.

sections.title: Attempting to pop a balloon animal after unlocking last barrier

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: Come on, we should leave before Evil Bob comes back! You go first; I'll follow along.

sections.title: Attempting to leave through the prison doors

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: Oi! we'll be using the exit that's over here.

sections.title: Attempting to drop items in the exit

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: Oi! No dropping stuff in the exit! Chuck it somewhere else!

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: Thanks a lot for your help! Here, have a present:

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks! See you around!

sections.title: Talking to Prison Pete after getting rewarded

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: Don't mind me, I was just leaving...
